title: Argentina CUIT Registration / Data Modification for Individuals and Undivided Estates (Solicitud de Inscripción / Modificación de Datos — Personas Físicas y Sucesiones Indivisas, F.460/F)
description: AFIP's (Administración Federal de Ingresos Públicos) combined request form for individuals (personas físicas / personas humanas) and undivided estates (sucesiones indivisas) to either newly register for a CUIT (Clave Única de Identificación Tributaria — Argentina's federal tax identifier) or to update previously-registered data, using the same 2-page fillable-AcroForm specimen, Formulario 460/F — the natural-person analogue of ar/afip/inscripcion-cuit-personas-juridicas (F.460/J, GOV-2169), and a sibling candidate explicitly scoped out of that session's brief for a later cycle. Structurally simpler than F.460/J: this specimen has no Original/Duplicado mirrored-copy structure (only 2 pages total, not 4) and no split-digit-box fields at all (its CUIT box, for example, is one plain text field, not 11 single-digit boxes) — but it does use 9 genuine PDF radio-button groups (confirmed via getFieldObjects() kidIds/shared-parent grouping) for its Sí/No-style choices (trámite type, nationality, residency, employer type, phone type, and 4 per-activity-row 'sociedad de hecho'/'otras' choices), each modelled here as a single required-or-optional `enum` field rather than a pair of independent booleans — unlike F.460/J's visually similar checkbox pairs, which the PDF itself implements as independent, non-grouped checkboxes requiring `exclusivityGroups`. This document therefore needs no `exclusivityGroups` at all. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Argentine Republic, the Ministerio de Economía, or AFIP.

source.documentRef: F. 460/F 'Solicitud de Inscripción / Modificación de Datos — Personas Físicas y Sucesiones Indivisas', Administración Federal de Ingresos Públicos (AFIP), 2-page fillable-AcroForm PDF

verification.notes: GOV-2195: deepens Argentina's Business Formation vertical via the natural-person analogue of ar/afip/inscripcion-cuit-personas-juridicas (F.460/J, GOV-2169). Fetched fresh with a browser User-Agent (HTTP 200, application/pdf, 208,143 bytes, genuine %PDF-1.6, SHA-256 be2465f8e8c52ef6cde52df6e8a0365c2a6575724a10c210d43396433829b699) directly from serviciosweb.afip.gob.ar with no login/CAPTCHA/WAF gate encountered, independently re-confirming a prior scouting lead (~148 widgets) from scratch rather than trusting its numbers. Extracted with pdfjs-dist (getFieldObjects()/getAnnotations()/getTextContent(), x/y-position-based label attribution): 148 raw AcroForm widgets across 2 pages (48 p.1, 100 p.2) — matching the prior scouting lead exactly. getFieldObjects() resolves the full field-name hierarchy to 180 distinct keys, but 41 of those are non-terminal parent/grouping nodes with zero widget instances of their own (an artifact of pdfjs's dotted-suffix disambiguation of same-named sibling fields, confirmed by checking every key's terminal `rect`-bearing entries programmatically, not assumed); 139 keys carry at least one real widget. Of those 139: 130 have exactly 1 terminal widget (simple text/checkbox/dropdown fields), and 9 have exactly 2 (genuine PDF radio-button groups, confirmed via each pair's shared `kidIds` under one non-terminal parent — arithmetic check: 130×1 + 9×2 = 148, matching the raw widget count exactly). Net: 139 real distinct logical fields, with zero split-digit-box merges needed (no field in this specimen carries a `maxLen` restriction consistent with a single-digit box, confirmed programmatically across all 148 widgets) — a materially simpler reconciliation than F.460/J's Original+Duplicado mirroring and 5 split-box merges. No AcroForm field in this specimen carries the `/Ff` Required bit and no asterisk-required convention is used (checked programmatically and by scanning all extracted text items for '*'); every field's `required` value is therefore a structurally-inferred judgment call, not a source-asserted claim, flagged as such in VERIFICATION.md. One PDF-authoring quirk is disclosed rather than silently corrected: the 'Tipo de empleador/a' radio group's own exportValues ('hecho'/'otras') are copy-pasted from the unrelated 'Componente de sociedad' ('De hecho'/'Otras') radio groups elsewhere on the same page, even though its own printed labels read 'Común'/'Personal de casas particulares' — the enum preserves the true source exportValues with the discrepancy documented on the field. A second quirk: the field capturing the printed 'Nombres (completo)' label carries the confusing raw AcroForm name 'Apellido.0.1' (evidently duplicated from the neighbouring Apellido paterno/materno fields without a full rename) — resolved by on-page position, not by field name, and disclosed on the field's own description. See VERIFICATION.md for the full sourcing record, every judgment call, and the mock conformance test run.

fields.name: requestType
fields.label: Trámite
fields.description: Whether this filing is a new CUIT registration ('Solic' = Solicitud de inscripción) or an update to already-registered data ('modif' = Modificación de datos). Confirmed a genuine PDF radio-button group via getFieldObjects() (a single non-terminal parent field 'Tramite' with 2 kids sharing kidIds, each carrying its own exportValue, radioButton semantics) — unlike this registry's sibling ar/afip/inscripcion-cuit-personas-juridicas (F.460/J), whose visually similar 'Solicitud de Inscripción'/'Modificación de Datos' pair are two independent, non-grouped checkboxes. Because this specimen's version is a real single-choice radio group, it is modelled here as one required `enum` field rather than two independent optional booleans.
fields.sourceRef: F.460/F p.1, header — 'Trámite' radio group (raw AcroForm field name 'Tramite')

fields.name: cuit
fields.label: CUIT
fields.description: The individual's (or undivided estate's) 11-digit CUIT (Clave Única de Identificación Tributaria). A single free-text AcroForm box (no maxLen restriction, no split-digit boxes) — unlike the sibling F.460/J specimen, which splits its CUIT box into 11 single-digit boxes (CUIT1..CUIT11); this specimen needed no such merge. Left blank on a first-time 'Solic' (Solicitud de inscripción) filing (no CUIT yet exists); expected to be populated on a 'modif' (Modificación de Datos) filing (see crossFieldValidation).
fields.sourceRef: F.460/F p.1, header — 'CUIT'

fields.name: requestReason
fields.label: Motivo del trámite
fields.description: Reason/channel for this filing, selected from a dropdown (AcroForm combobox 'motivo').
fields.sourceRef: F.460/F p.1, header — 'Motivo del trámite'

fields.name: identityDocumentType
fields.label: Tipo de documento
fields.description: Type of identity document presented, selected from a dropdown (AcroForm combobox 'tipodocumento').
fields.sourceRef: F.460/F p.1, Datos de Identificación — 'Tipo de documento'

fields.name: identityDocumentNumber
fields.label: N° de documento
fields.description: Identity document number, corresponding to the type selected in identityDocumentType.
fields.sourceRef: F.460/F p.1, Datos de Identificación — 'N° de documento'

fields.name: birthDate
fields.label: Fecha de nacimiento
fields.description: The individual's date of birth.
fields.sourceRef: F.460/F p.1, Datos de Identificación — 'Fecha de nacimiento'

fields.name: sex
fields.label: Sexo
fields.description: Sex as it appears on the identity document ('tal como figura en documento'). Modelled as an open string rather than a closed enum: unlike ar/cancilleria/formulario-solicitud-visado's 'sex' field (which cites an explicit 'M o F' footnote), this specimen's AcroForm box is a plain, unrestricted text field with no footnote or dropdown enumerating accepted values, so no enum is asserted here (disclosed rather than assumed).
fields.sourceRef: F.460/F p.1, Datos de Identificación — 'Sexo (tal como figura en documento)'

fields.name: deathDate
fields.label: Fecha de fallecimiento
fields.description: Date of death, applicable only when the filer is a 'sucesión indivisa' (undivided estate/inheritance-in-probate) rather than a living individual — this specimen's own title ('Personas humanas / Sucesiones indivisas') and this field's own caption ('de corresponder', i.e. 'if applicable') confirm both filer types share this one form.
fields.sourceRef: F.460/F p.1, Datos de Identificación — 'Fecha de fallecimiento (de corresponder)'

fields.name: nationality
fields.label: Argentino/a o Extranjero/a
fields.description: Whether the individual is Argentine or foreign. Confirmed a genuine PDF radio-button group (parent field 'argentino o extranjero', 2 kids, shared kidIds) — a single required enum, not two independent booleans.
fields.sourceRef: F.460/F p.1, Datos de Identificación — 'Argentino/a' / 'Extranjero/a' radio group

fields.name: countryOfOrigin
fields.label: País de origen
fields.description: Country of origin, relevant when nationality is 'extranjero' (foreign) — see crossFieldValidation.
fields.sourceRef: F.460/F p.1, Datos de Identificación — 'País de origen'

fields.name: residencyStatus
fields.label: Residente / No residente
fields.description: Whether the (foreign) individual is resident or non-resident in Argentina. Confirmed a genuine PDF radio-button group (parent field 'residenteonoresidente', 2 kids, shared kidIds).
fields.sourceRef: F.460/F p.1, Datos de Identificación — 'Residente' / 'No residente' radio group

fields.name: residencePermitType
fields.label: Tipo de residencia
fields.description: Type of residence permit held, relevant when nationality is 'extranjero', selected from a dropdown (AcroForm combobox 'tiporesidencia').
fields.sourceRef: F.460/F p.1, Datos de Identificación — 'Tipo de residencia'

fields.name: residencePermitValidUntil
fields.label: Vigencia residencia (hasta)
fields.description: Expiry date of the residence permit named in residencePermitType.
fields.sourceRef: F.460/F p.1, Datos de Identificación — 'Vigencia residencia (hasta)'

fields.name: paternalSurname
fields.label: Apellido paterno

fields.sourceRef: F.460/F p.1, Datos Referenciales — 'Apellido paterno'

fields.name: givenNames
fields.label: Nombres (completo)
fields.description: The individual's given name(s) in full. NOTE on source-fidelity: this field's own raw AcroForm field name is 'Apellido.0.1' — a PDF-authoring naming quirk (the widget appears to have been duplicated from the neighbouring 'Apellido paterno'/'Apellido materno' fields without the field name being fully updated) confirmed by its on-page position directly beside the printed 'Nombres (completo)' label, not by its own field name; modelled here by position, not by the misleading raw name.
fields.sourceRef: F.460/F p.1, Datos Referenciales — 'Nombres (completo)' (raw AcroForm field name 'Apellido.0.1')

fields.name: employerType
fields.label: Tipo de empleador/a
fields.description: Whether the individual is a 'Común' (ordinary/general) employer or employs 'Personal de casas particulares' (private household/domestic staff). Confirmed a genuine PDF radio-button group (parent field 'Tipo empleador', 2 kids, shared kidIds) — but flagged as a source-fidelity judgment call: this group's own exportValues are literally 'hecho'/'otras', identical to the unrelated 'comp soc'/'De hecho'-'Otras' groups above, while the printed on-page labels actually read 'Común'/'Personal de casas particulares'. This is a PDF-authoring quirk (the widget pair was evidently duplicated from the 'comp soc' radio group without updating its export values) — disclosed here rather than silently relabelled; the enum below preserves the true source exportValues, and this description records what they actually display as.
fields.sourceRef: F.460/F p.2, Datos de la Seguridad Social — 'Tipo de empleador/a' radio group (raw exportValues 'hecho'='Común', 'otras'='Personal de casas particulares')

fields.name: employerStartMonthYear

fields.description: Date the individual began acting as an employer.
fields.sourceRef: F.460/F p.2, Datos de la Seguridad Social — 'Fecha de inicio' (employer)

fields.name: employeeCount
fields.label: Cantidad de personal
fields.description: Number of employees the individual has.
fields.sourceRef: F.460/F p.2, Datos de la Seguridad Social — 'Cantidad de personal'

fields.name: swornDeclarationAcknowledgement
fields.label: Declaración Jurada
fields.description: Checkbox acknowledging the sworn declaration ('Declaro que los datos consignados en este formulario son correctos y completos...') printed immediately below it. Positioned directly under the '10- DECLARACIÓN JURADA' section heading and above the declaration paragraph, with no separate caption of its own beyond that paragraph — modelled as the affirmation checkbox for that paragraph (a judgment call, disclosed here since the specimen provides no other label for this specific box).
fields.sourceRef: F.460/F p.2, Declaración Jurada — checkbox beside 'Declaro que los datos consignados en este formulario son correctos y completos...'

fields.name: declarationDate
fields.label: Fecha
fields.description: Date of signing the sworn declaration.
fields.sourceRef: F.460/F p.2, Declaración Jurada — 'Fecha'

fields.name: declarationPlace
fields.label: Lugar
fields.description: Place of signing the sworn declaration.
fields.sourceRef: F.460/F p.2, Declaración Jurada — 'Lugar'

fields.name: signerCapacity
fields.label: Carácter
fields.description: Capacity in which the declarant signs: 'Titular' (the individual themself) or 'Apoderado/a' (an attorney-in-fact/representative acting on their behalf), selected from a dropdown (AcroForm combobox 'Caracter').
fields.sourceRef: F.460/F p.2, Declaración Jurada — 'Carácter'

fields.name: attorneyName
fields.label: Apellido y nombre (en caso de ser apoderado/a)
fields.description: Full name of the attorney-in-fact/representative signing on the individual's behalf, applicable only when signerCapacity is 'Apoderado/a' (see crossFieldValidation).
fields.sourceRef: F.460/F p.2, Declaración Jurada — 'Apellido y nombre (en caso de ser apoderado/a)'
